nasb.text: And many were bringing gifts to the Lord at Jerusalem and choice presents to Hezekiah king of Judah, so that he was exalted in the sight of all nations thereafter.

esv.text: And many brought gifts to the Lord to Jerusalem and precious things to Hezekiah king of Judah, so that he was exalted in the sight of all nations from that time onward.

cnv.text: 有很多人把供物帶到耶路撒冷獻給耶和華，又把很多寶物送給猶大王希西家；從此，希西家受到各國的尊重。

ccb.text: 许多人带着祭物到耶路撒冷献给耶和华，也带许多名贵的礼物送给犹大王希西迦。此后，希西迦受到各国的敬重。
